description_long: This object is a chunk of bread with a thick, golden-brown crust and a dense, slightly irregular interior. The crust appears to be well-baked, with a rough, uneven surface and some darker toasted spots, suggesting it was exposed to high heat. The interior is pale and slightly yellowish, with a porous, airy structure typical of rustic or artisan bread. There are no visible seeds, flour dusting, or decorative scoring on the crust, giving it a natural, homemade appearance. The bread piece is roughly wedge-shaped, with one side showing a broad, flat cut and the other sides tapering to a point. The overall look suggests a hearty, hand-torn or cut piece of bread, possibly from a larger loaf.
description: A thick, rustic chunk of bread with a golden-brown, rough crust and a pale, airy interior. The piece is wedge-shaped and appears hand-cut, with no visible seeds or flour dusting.
description_view_0: Tall, narrow side view showing the height of the bread and the rough, uneven crust surface.
description_view_1: Wide, flat cut surface is visible, revealing the porous, airy interior and the thickness of the crust.
description_view_2: Opposite narrow side, highlighting the tapering shape and the transition from crust to interior.
description_view_3: Broad, angled view of the crust and interior, showing the wedge-like form and the natural, rustic texture.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is thick, rough, and uneven, with a natural, rustic appearance and some darker toasted spots. There are no visible decorative patterns, flour dusting, or seeds.
